==Universe Energy Cube==
Clinical Studies have shown that transplanting this energy into the body does not cause significant physical damage. No cases of rejection have ever been documented. Still, long-term effects remain to be seen.

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Universe Energy Cube
|Rarity=orange
|ID Number=56
|Initial HP=80
|HP Increase=20
|Initial ATK=3
|ATK Increase=1
|Initial DEF=14
|DEF Increase=4
|Initial RUSH=3
|RUSH Increase=1
|Effect 1=Water DMG +###
|Initial Effect Value 1=3
|Effect Value Increase 1=3
|Effect 2=Earth DMG +###
|Initial Effect Value 2=3
|Effect Value Increase 2=3
|Effect 3=Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +###%
|Initial Effect Value 3=1
|Effect Value Increase 3=1
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

==Source==
[[Gene Simulation|Ratman Gene Simulation]] and [[Unispark Lottery|Unispark Lottery]]

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Orange Organs]]
